name: Oyster Pie Picayune
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a greased baking dish with pie dough and bake until done but not brown.
2. Fry 4 slices of bacon; save the grease.
3. In 2 tablespoons of bacon grease, sauté shallots, celery, and bell pepper.
4. Drain oysters and mushrooms, using any remaining liquid (up to 1 cup if necessary with water).
5. Blend in mushroom soup mix until thickened.
6. Cook oysters over medium heat until edges curl.
7. Add cooked oysters and liquid to the soup mixture.
8. Incorporate shallots, celery, bell pepper, drained mushrooms, parsley, Season All, salt, and crumbled bacon.
9. Stir and fill the pie crust.
10. Place a fresh crust on top.
11. Bake at 350°F until brown.
